description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in MidiCart PHP Shopping Cart allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) searchstring parameter to search_list.php or the (2) secondgroup or (3) maingroup parameters to item_list.php.
